title: Greece — Statement of Economic Data from Business Activity (Form Ε3), Individual/Sole-Proprietor Income-Statement Pathway
description: Greece's companion business/professional-activity income-statement schedule to the annual personal income tax return, "Κατάσταση Οικονομικών Στοιχείων από Επιχειρηματική Δραστηριότητα" (Form Ε3, tax year 2025), served by the Independent Authority for Public Revenue (AADE), adding a third Taxes-vertical schema for Greece alongside gr/aade/dilosi-forologias-eisodimatos-e1-e2-e3 (Form Ε1) and gr/aade/analytiki-katastasi-misthomaton-akinitis-periousias-e2 (Form Ε2). The source is AADE's own 12-page Form Ε3 specimen (tax year 2025 edition), a large multi-table document spanning taxpayer/business identification (Πίνακας Α'), company information (Πίνακας Β'), rents paid and agricultural subsidies (Πίνακας Γ'), a 5-column (Commercial/Production/Agricultural-Biological/Services/Total) financial-data table (Πίνακας Δ'), accounting-vs-tax basis timing differences (Πίνακας Ε'), determination of taxable profits of individual businesses (Πίνακας ΣΤ'), general financial information (Πίνακας Ζ'), a construction-companies' net-profit schedule (Πίνακας Η'), multinational-group country-by-country/Pillar-Two reporting (Πίνακες Θ'/ΙΒ'), anti-money-laundering information (Πίνακας Ι'), and legal-person tax-exemption sub-panels (Πίνακας ΙΑ'), plus a companion 89-page instructions manual, an 8-page sub-tables companion, and a 14-page FAQ. This v1.0.0 scopes to the primary/core case: a single individual (freelancer/sole-proprietor) business activity's income statement, modeling Πίνακας Α's taxpayer/business identification, Πίνακας Δ's "Σύνολο" (Total) column only (the aggregate income-statement line items — revenue, cost of goods sold, gross profit, other income/expenses, EBITDA, depreciation, EBIT, interest, pre-tax result, gross margin), and Πίνακας ΣΤ's "Σύνολο" column only (the individual-business-specific chain of adjustments — literally titled "Determination of taxable profits of INDIVIDUAL businesses" — that converts the accounting pre-tax result into the taxable net profit that flows into Form Ε1). Πίνακας Β (employment/company metadata), Πίνακας Γ (rents paid and agricultural subsidies), the per-activity-type (Commercial/Production/Agricultural-Biological/Services) breakdown columns of Πίνακες Δ and ΣΤ and their granular cost-buildup sub-schedules, Πίνακας Ε (accounting-tax basis differences), Πίνακας Ζ (general financial information, e-commerce/POS/digital-address disclosures), Πίνακας Η (construction companies), Πίνακες Θ/ΙΒ (multinational-group reporting), Πίνακας Ι (anti-money-laundering), and Πίνακας ΙΑ (legal-person tax exemptions under ν.4935/2022) are out of scope for this v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosure and future companion-schema candidates. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Greece or AADE.

source.documentRef: AADE, Form Ε3 "Κατάσταση Οικονομικών Στοιχείων από Επιχειρηματική Δραστηριότητα, Φορολογικού Έτους 2025" (Statement of Economic Data from Business Activity, tax year 2025); Wayback Machine mirror, since www.aade.gr is Akamai-403-gated from this sandbox. Companion sub-tables document: AADE, "Υποπίνακες Εντύπου Ε3" (entypoE3_FE_202_ypopinakes.pdf), via https://web.archive.org/web/20260419184745/https://www.aade.gr/sites/default/files/2026-03/entypoE3_FE_202_ypopinakes.pdf. Companion instructions manual: AADE, "Οδηγίες Συμπλήρωσης Εντύπου Ε3, Φορολογικού Έτους 2025" (odigies_E3_FE_2025.pdf), via https://web.archive.org/web/20260419184103/https://www.aade.gr/sites/default/files/2026-03/odigies_E3_FE_2025.pdf. Companion FAQ: AADE, "Συχνές ερωτήσεις – απαντήσεις για τη συμπλήρωση του Ε3" (Athens, 13 March 2026), via https://web.archive.org/web/20260419181909/https://www.aade.gr/sites/default/files/2026-03/FAQs_E3_13032026_0.pdf.

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2654, a child of the standing research routine (GOV-2609/GOV-2167). Adds Greece's third Taxes-vertical schema, a companion to gr/aade/dilosi-forologias-eisodimatos-e1-e2-e3 (Form Ε1, GOV-2621/PR #429) and gr/aade/analytiki-katastasi-misthomaton-akinitis-periousias-e2 (Form Ε2, GOV-2644/PR #433). The primary www.aade.gr host is Akamai-403-gated from this sandbox, consistent with this registry's established pattern for Greek government hosts. All four source documents were independently re-located this cycle via the Wayback Machine CDX API (http://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=aade.gr/sites/default/files&matchType=prefix&filter=original:.*[Ee]3.*\.pdf) rather than trusting a prior cycle's unrecorded claim, then independently re-fetched via curl through their Wayback Machine mirrors (exact CDX-confirmed snapshot timestamps): specimen — HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 434,154 bytes, sha256 72d4c0e9c8529cc510e4e40b6e3eb4d77a1094ab7544031712566f55f8ad2b31; sub-tables — HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 376,069 bytes, sha256 29f295ef3de8117c59edcf901bfbe85128905b3565f6b4021c1e5cf1e3861317; instructions manual — HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 2,606,056 bytes, sha256 0c8560ac02cf50bf755d84b74e2d1db9be855fe1e79c80632e6a2f36ad6dfa84; FAQ — HTTP 200, Content-Type application/pdf, 398,508 bytes, sha256 68b8fb2198aa6e2e549e8515fc196091b8e79fc12700b842e1b57b865d08a176 — all four computed independently via sha256sum on freshly downloaded files. Parsed with pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): specimen confirmed 12 pages, 17,039 extractable text chars, 0 AcroForm widgets on every page (a static specimen, not a fillable form); instructions manual confirmed 89 pages (matching a prior cycle's unverified claim of '89-page instructions manual', now independently reproduced); FAQ confirmed 14 pages; sub-tables confirmed 8 pages. Every in-scope page (specimen pages 3, 7, 8, 9; instructions manual printed pages 14-16, 42-52, 56-63; FAQ pages 1-8) was read directly from the position-sorted text layer (items grouped into rows by rounded y, sorted by x), not assumed from any prior summary.

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Tax year
fields.description: The tax year (φορολογικό έτος) this business-activity statement covers, e.g. "2025". This source is itself the tax-year-2025 edition ("ΚΑΤΑΣΤΑΣΗ ΟΙΚΟΝΟΜΙΚΩΝ ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΩΝ ΑΠΟ ΕΠΙΧΕΙΡΗΜΑΤΙΚΗ ΔΡΑΣΤΗΡΙΟΤΗΤΑ 2025"). Per the companion FAQ (Q2), Ε3 must be submitted before the final submission of the income tax return (Ε1), even if it reports a zero result.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.1-2 title block; FAQ Q2

fields.name: filerTin
fields.label: ΑΦΜ (Taxpayer Identification Number) — filer
fields.description: Code 020: the filer's 9-digit Greek Tax Identification Number (ΑΦΜ), pre-filled by AADE from the taxpayer's own Μητρώο (registry) record. Per the companion FAQ (Q1), a spouse/civil-partner who is themselves liable to file Ε3 must submit it under their own personal e-filing credentials, separate from the couple's joint Ε1 — this schema models a single filer's own Ε3.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', code 020; instructions manual printed p.15; FAQ Q1

fields.name: primaryActivityCode
fields.label: Κωδικός Αριθμός Κύριας Δραστηριότητας (ΚΑΔ) — primary business-activity code
fields.description: Code 021: the filer's primary business-activity code (ΚΑΔ), pre-filled by AADE from the taxpayer's Μητρώο (registry) record as of 31 December of the tax year (natural persons) or the tax year's own closing date (legal persons/entities). Modeled as a numeric-code string since ΚΑΔ codes are reported at varying digit depths (2/4/6/8-digit hierarchy levels); from tax year 2019 onward the registry reports the full 8-digit analytical code.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', code 021; instructions manual printed p.15

fields.name: mainRevenueActivityCode
fields.label: Κ.Α.Δ. που αντιστοιχεί στα μεγαλύτερα ακαθάριστα έσοδα — activity code with the highest gross revenue
fields.description: Code 022: the ΚΑΔ business-activity code that generated the filer's highest gross revenue for the tax year, selected by the filer from a pop-up list of the codes already declared in their Μητρώο (registry) record — may differ from primaryActivityCode.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', code 022; instructions manual printed pp.15-16

fields.name: mainRevenueActivityDescription
fields.label: Description of the activity with the highest revenue
fields.description: Free-text description accompanying mainRevenueActivityCode ("Γράψτε τη δραστηριότητα με τα μεγαλύτερα έσοδα" — "Write the activity with the highest revenue"), printed directly beneath code 022 on the specimen.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', beneath code 022

fields.name: filerSurname
fields.label: Surname (ΕΠΩΝΥΜΟ Α') — filer, natural person
fields.description: The filer's surname, for a natural-person (individual/sole-proprietor) filer. Printed alongside legalEntityName as an alternate identification path for legal persons/entities; this schema's core scope is the individual/sole-proprietor pathway.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', ΕΠΩΝΥΜΟ Α'

fields.name: filerSurnameAlt
fields.label: Alternate/second surname (ΕΠΩΝΥΜΟ Β')
fields.description: A second surname box printed directly beneath ΕΠΩΝΥΜΟ Α' (e.g. a married woman's maiden surname, consistent with this registry's own gr/aade Ε1 precedent for a similar second-surname box) — neither the specimen's own instructions nor the companion FAQ elaborates its purpose further; modeled as optional and disclosed as unelaborated by the sources read this cycle.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', ΕΠΩΝΥΜΟ Β'

fields.name: filerFirstName
fields.label: First name (ΟΝΟΜΑ) — filer, natural person
fields.description: The filer's first name, for a natural-person (individual/sole-proprietor) filer.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', ΟΝΟΜΑ

fields.name: filerFatherName
fields.label: Father's name (ΟΝΟΜΑ ΠΑΤΕΡΑ) — filer, natural person
fields.description: The filer's father's name, per Greek civil-registry naming convention, consistent with this registry's own gr/aade Ε1/Ε2 precedent for the same box.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', ΟΝΟΜΑ ΠΑΤΕΡΑ

fields.name: legalEntityName
fields.label: Registered company name (ΕΠΩΝΥΜΙΑ, Μη Φυσικού Προσώπου)
fields.description: The registered company/legal-entity name, for a legal-person/legal-entity filer — the alternate identification path to filerSurname/filerFirstName/filerFatherName. Left optional since this schema's core scope is the individual/sole-proprietor pathway; a legal-entity filer would populate this field instead of the natural-person name fields.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.3, Πίνακας Α', ΕΠΩΝΥΜΙΑ (Μη Φυσικού Προσώπου)

fields.name: totalSalesRevenue
fields.label: Κωδικός 500 — Πωλήσεις αγαθών και παροχή υπηρεσιών (Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 500 (Πίνακας Δ1, "Σύνολο"/Total column): total sales of goods and provision of services for the tax year, across all activity types. Per the instructions manual (printed p.43), this code is auto-computed by the e-filing system as the sum of codes 100+200+300+400 (the Commercial/Production/Agricultural-Biological/Services activity-type columns), which are themselves transferred from Πίνακας Ζ1's revenue codes — out of scope for this v1.0.0 (see VERIFICATION.md). Modeled here as the single aggregate top-line revenue figure of the filer's income statement.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.7, Πίνακας Δ', code 500; instructions manual printed p.43

fields.name: totalCostOfGoodsSold
fields.label: Κωδικός 520 — Σύνολο κόστους πωληθέντων (Δ6, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 520 (Δ6, "Σύνολο" column): total cost of goods/services sold, auto-computed by the e-filing system as the sum of codes 120+220+320+420 (the per-activity-type cost-of-sales subtotals Δ2/Δ3/Δ4/Δ5), each of which is itself built up from a granular cost sub-schedule (opening/closing inventory, purchases, impairments, own-production) — out of scope for this v1.0.0.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 520; instructions manual printed p.49

fields.name: totalGrossProfit
fields.label: Κωδικός 521 — Μικτό κέρδος (Δ7, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 521 (Δ7, "Σύνολο" column): gross profit, auto-computed by the e-filing system as totalSalesRevenue minus totalCostOfGoodsSold (Δ1-Δ6).
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 521; instructions manual printed p.50

fields.name: totalOtherIncome
fields.label: Κωδικός 522 — Λοιπά έσοδα εξαιρουμένων των πιστωτικών τόκων (Δ8, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 522 (Δ8, "Σύνολο" column): other income excluding credit interest and related income, auto-computed by the e-filing system as the sum of Πίνακας Ζ1 codes 162+164+165+166+167+168+170 (and their per-activity-type equivalents) — Πίνακας Ζ1 itself is out of scope for this v1.0.0.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 522; instructions manual printed p.50

fields.name: totalOtherExpenses
fields.label: Κωδικός 523 — Λοιπά έξοδα εξαιρουμένων τόκων και αποσβέσεων (Δ9, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 523 (Δ9, "Σύνολο" column): other expenses excluding interest and depreciation, auto-computed by the e-filing system as the sum of user-entered codes 123+223+323+423 (per activity type). Per the instructions manual (printed p.50), code 423 (Services activity) must additionally follow the guidance of circular Ε.2005/2026.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 523; instructions manual printed p.50

fields.name: totalEbitda
fields.label: Κωδικός 524 — Αποτελέσματα προ φόρων, τόκων και αποσβέσεων EBITDA (Δ10, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 524 (Δ10, "Σύνολο" column): earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization (EBITDA), auto-computed by the e-filing system as the sum of code 526 (totalEbit) and code 587 (total depreciation as reported in Πίνακας Ζ2, out of scope for this v1.0.0), per circular Ε.2005/2026.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 524; instructions manual printed p.51

fields.name: totalDepreciation
fields.label: Κωδικός 525 — Αποσβέσεις (Δ11, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 525 (Δ11, "Σύνολο" column): total depreciation/amortization for the tax year, auto-computed by the e-filing system as the sum of user-entered codes 125+225+325+425 (per activity type).
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 525; instructions manual printed p.51

fields.name: totalEbit
fields.label: Κωδικός 526 — Αποτελέσματα προ φόρων και τόκων EBIT (Δ12, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 526 (Δ12, "Σύνολο" column): earnings before interest and taxes (EBIT), auto-computed by the e-filing system as totalGrossProfit + totalOtherIncome - totalOtherExpenses - totalDepreciation ([526] = [521] + [522] - [523] - [525]).
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 526; instructions manual printed pp.51-52

fields.name: totalCreditInterestIncome
fields.label: Κωδικός 527 — Πιστωτικοί τόκοι και συναφή έσοδα (Δ13, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 527 (Δ13, "Σύνολο" column): credit interest and related income, transferred by the e-filing system from Πίνακας Ζ1 code 563 (out of scope for this v1.0.0).
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 527; instructions manual printed p.52

fields.name: totalDebitInterestExpense
fields.label: Κωδικός 528 — Χρεωστικοί τόκοι και συναφή έξοδα (Δ14, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 528 (Δ14, "Σύνολο" column): debit interest and related expenses, transferred by the e-filing system from Πίνακας Ζ2 code 586 (out of scope for this v1.0.0).
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 528; instructions manual printed pp.52-53

fields.name: totalPretaxResult
fields.label: Κωδικός 529 — Αποτελέσματα προ φόρων (Δ15, Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 529 (Δ15, "Σύνολο" column): the accounting pre-tax result, auto-computed by the e-filing system as totalEbit + totalCreditInterestIncome - totalDebitInterestExpense (126+127-128, per-column analogue). This is the value transferred into Πίνακας ΣΤ's own opening code 540 (pretaxAccountingResult) for individual/sole-proprietor filers.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ', code 529; instructions manual printed p.53

fields.name: grossProfitMarginPercentOnSales
fields.label: Ποσοστό μικτού κέρδους επί πωλήσεων (Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 530 ("Σύνολο" column): gross profit margin as a percentage of sales, auto-computed by the e-filing system as (totalGrossProfit / totalSalesRevenue) * 100. Per the instructions manual (printed p.53), the equivalent "gross profit margin on cost" and "net profit margin on sales" ratios (codes 131/231/331/431 and 132/232/332/432) have no "Σύνολο"/Total-column analogue in the source and are therefore not modeled.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.8, Πίνακας Δ'; instructions manual printed p.53

fields.name: pretaxAccountingResult
fields.label: (α) Αποτελέσματα προ φόρου — Κωδικός 540 (Πίνακας ΣΤ', Σύνολο)
fields.description: Code 540 (Πίνακας ΣΤ', row (α), "Σύνολο" column): the accounting pre-tax result carried over from Πίνακας Δ15's own totalPretaxResult (code 529). Per the instructions manual (printed p.56), Πίνακας ΣΤ is completed exclusively by individual/sole-proprietor businesses ("ατομικές επιχειρήσεις"), regardless of single- or double-entry bookkeeping, and its completion is a precondition for transferring the taxable net result into the personal income tax return (Form Ε1) — the opening figure of this table is therefore modeled as required.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 540; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: plusTemporaryDifferencesPositive
fields.label: (β) Πλέον: προσωρινές διαφορές μεταξύ ΕΛΠ - Φορολογικής Βάσης — Κωδικός 541
fields.description: Code 541 (row (β), "Σύνολο" column): amount to be added for positive temporary (accounting-basis vs. tax-basis) differences under Greek Accounting Standards (ΕΛΠ), auto-computed as the sum of the per-activity-type codes 141+241+341+441 entered by the filer.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 541; instructions manual printed p.58

fields.name: minusTemporaryDifferencesNegative
fields.label: (γ) Μείον: προσωρινές διαφορές μεταξύ ΕΛΠ - Φορολογικής Βάσης — Κωδικός 542
fields.description: Code 542 (row (γ), "Σύνολο" column): amount to be subtracted for negative temporary (accounting-basis vs. tax-basis) differences under Greek Accounting Standards (ΕΛΠ), auto-computed as the sum of the per-activity-type codes 142+242+342+442 entered by the filer.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 542; instructions manual printed p.58

fields.name: plusNonDeductibleExpenses
fields.label: (δ) Πλέον: Δαπάνες μη εκπιπτόμενες — Κωδικός 543
fields.description: Code 543 (row (δ), "Σύνολο" column): non-tax-deductible expenses to be added back, auto-computed as the sum of the per-activity-type codes 143+243+343+443 entered by the filer.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 543; instructions manual printed p.58

fields.name: minusTaxExemptIncome
fields.label: (ε) Μείον: Αφορολόγητα έσοδα / Αυτοτελώς Φορολογούμενα Ποσά — Κωδικός 544
fields.description: Code 544 (row (ε), "Σύνολο" column): tax-exempt income or amounts taxed autonomously (e.g. disaster-relief subsidies, returnable-advance debt write-offs, tips up to €300/month via digital platforms, itinerant lottery-ticket sellers' results), to be subtracted. The source's own internal sub-panel for this code lists dozens of distinct numbered reason-options (e.g. options 002, 007, 014, 015, 022, 025-027, 032, 034-039, per the FAQ and instructions manual), each tied to a specific legal provision — out of scope for this v1.0.0; modeled here only as the aggregate amount to subtract, per activity type totals 144+244+344+444.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 544; instructions manual printed pp.58-63; FAQ Q15, Q24

fields.name: minusTaxFreeReserveArticle71A
fields.label: (στ) Μείον: Αφορολόγητο αποθεματικό άρθρου 71Α ν. 4172/2013 — Κωδικός 545
fields.description: Code 545 (row (στ), "Σύνολο" column): tax-free reserve under Article 71Α of Law 4172/2013, to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 545; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusElectricityDisposalProfits
fields.label: (ζ) Μείον: Κέρδη από διάθεση ηλεκτρικής ενέργειας (παρ. 6 άρθρου 29 ν. 4172/2013) — Κωδικός 546
fields.description: Code 546 (row (ζ), "Σύνολο" column): profits from the disposal of electrical energy under paragraph 6 of Article 29 of Law 4172/2013, to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 546; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusDisabledEmploymentDeduction
fields.label: (η) Μείον: Έκπτωση λόγω απασχόλησης ατόμων με αναπηρία (παρ. 10 άρθρ. 4 ν. 3522/2006) — Κωδικός 547
fields.description: Code 547 (row (η), "Σύνολο" column): deduction for employing persons with disabilities under paragraph 10 of Article 4 of Law 3522/2006, to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 547; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusVehicleTransferCapitalGain
fields.label: (θ) Μείον: Υπεραξία μεταβίβασης αυτοκινήτου — Κωδικός 548
fields.description: Code 548 (row (θ), "Σύνολο" column): capital gain from the transfer of a public-use (Δ.Χ.) vehicle under Article 10 of Law 2579/1998 or a vehicle under Article 5 of Legislative Decree 1146/1972 where the business elected autonomous taxation on the gain and it has been recorded in its books, to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 548; instructions manual printed p.57; specimen p.12, note (13)

fields.name: minusDevelopmentLawTaxExemptDeductions
fields.label: (ι) Μείον: Αφορολόγητες εκπτώσεις αναπτυξιακών νόμων — Κωδικός 549
fields.description: Code 549 (row (ι), "Σύνολο" column): tax-exempt deductions under Greece's developmental-investment laws, to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 549; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusArticle22ExpensesDisallowed
fields.label: (ια) Μείον: Δαπάνες άρθρων 22Α, 22Β και 22Ε ν. 4172/2013 (εξωλογιστικά) — Κωδικός 550
fields.description: Code 550 (row (ια), "Σύνολο" column): expenses under Articles 22Α, 22Β and 22Ε of Law 4172/2013 (extra-accounting adjustment), to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 550; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusNewJobsEmployerContributionDeduction
fields.label: (ιβ) Μείον: Έκπτωση εργοδοτικών εισφορών άρθρου 71Δ ν. 4172/2013 (εξωλογιστικά) — Κωδικός 557
fields.description: Code 557 (row (ιβ), "Σύνολο" column): deduction of employer social-security contributions for creating new jobs under Article 71Δ of Law 4172/2013 (extra-accounting adjustment), to be subtracted. Note the source's own row lettering/code-number sequence is non-consecutive here — row (ιβ) uses code 557, out of numeric order relative to neighbouring rows (ια)=550 and (ιγ)=551 — confirmed by re-reading the position-sorted specimen text directly, not an extraction error.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 557; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusAudiovisualProductionInvestmentDeduction
fields.label: (ιγ) Μείον: Επένδυση ενίσχυσης παραγωγής οπτικοακουστικών έργων (άρθρο 71Ε ν. 4172/2013) — Κωδικός 551
fields.description: Code 551 (row (ιγ), "Σύνολο" column): investment amount for supporting audiovisual-works production under Article 71Ε of Law 4172/2013, to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 551; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusEInvoicingExpenseDeduction
fields.label: (ιδ) Μείον: Δαπάνες ηλεκτρονικής τιμολόγησης άρθρου 71Θ' ν. 4172/2013 (εξωλογιστικά) — Κωδικός 558
fields.description: Code 558 (row (ιδ), "Σύνολο" column): expenses for implementing electronic invoicing under Article 71Θ' of Law 4172/2013 (extra-accounting adjustment), to be subtracted.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 558; instructions manual printed p.57

fields.name: minusAcceleratedDepreciationArticle24
fields.label: (ιε) Μείον: Προσαυξημένες αποσβέσεις άρθρου 24 ν. 4172/2013 (εξωλογιστικά) — Κωδικός 556
fields.description: Code 556 (row (ιε), "Σύνολο" column): increased/accelerated depreciation under Article 24 of Law 4172/2013 (extra-accounting adjustment), to be subtracted. Per specimen note (16), this records 40% of the difference between accounting and notional (τεκμαρτά) profits where double-entry books are kept.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 556; instructions manual printed p.57; specimen p.12, note (16)

fields.name: taxableNetProfitBusinessActivity
fields.label: Φορολογητέα καθαρά αποτελέσματα από επιχειρηματική δραστηριότητα — Κωδικός 552
fields.description: Code 552 ("Σύνολο" column): the taxable net profit from business activity, auto-computed by the e-filing system as (α)+(β)-(γ)+(δ)-(ε)-(στ)-(ζ)-(η)-(θ)-(ι)-(ια)-(ιβ)-(ιγ)-(ιδ)-(ιε) — i.e. pretaxAccountingResult plus/minus the fourteen adjustment codes modeled above. This is the culminating figure this schema's title ("Statement of Economic Data from Business Activity") refers to, and is what this table transfers into Form Ε1 for individual/sole-proprietor filers.
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 552; instructions manual printed pp.56-57

fields.name: totalNetTaxableResult
fields.label: Συνολικά Καθαρά Αποτελέσματα — Κωδικός 555
fields.description: Code 555: the grand total net taxable result, auto-computed by the e-filing system by further combining taxableNetProfitBusinessActivity (code 552) with the agricultural-biological-activity net result (code 553) and other narrow companion codes not modeled in this v1.0.0 (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Specimen p.9, Πίνακας ΣΤ', code 555; instructions manual printed p.56
